topic: My ceiling has a water stain in the shape of my own face that appeared the day I moved in
title: My Bedroom Ceiling Has a Water Stain in the Shape of My Own Face | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My ceiling has a water stain in the shape of my face. It appeared the day I moved in.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bedroom ceiling with a brown water stain visible in the rough shape of a human face, dim bedside lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two bedroom condo. Moved in last August. Fresh paint everywhere.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small bedroom with bare painted walls and a single bed, late afternoon light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep on my back. I look up at the ceiling.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a white painted bedroom ceiling viewed from below at night, dim ambient light, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First night. Small brown spot above me. Could not place the shape.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a small brown water spot on a white ceiling, dim bedside lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photographed it. Sent to my building manager.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a sent text message with a photograph attachment, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He came up. Said no plumbing above the ceiling there. No source for water.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a maintenance worker in coveralls seen from behind looking up at a ceiling, no face visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The stain has been spreading. I take a photo every Sunday.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a phone screen showing a grid of weekly photographs of the same ceiling spot growing larger over time, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: After three months it had formed a face. The face was mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a ceiling water stain that has expanded into the rough features of a human face, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cropped the photo against my driver's license picture. Same nose. Same lip line. Same chin.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a laptop screen showing a side by side comparison of two photographs, one of a ceiling stain and one with the face area blurred, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the eyes appeared. They are closed. My own eyes are open as I write this.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a ceiling water stain in the shape of a face with two closed eye marks visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior of a darkened bedroom at night with the ceiling stain visible above the bed, soft moonlight, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep in the living room now. The face is patient. Still on the ceiling.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a couch in a living room with a blanket and pillow set up for sleeping, dim ambient lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
